evals.name: full-sweep
evals.expected_output: Full review fixing all react skill rules

assertions.trap: Sequential await fetchUser/fetchOrders/fetchAnalytics
assertions.description: Parallelize independent fetches with Promise.all / start-early-await-late

assertions.trap: fetchUser/fetchAnalytics not wrapped in React.cache()
assertions.description: React.cache() for per-request deduplication in server components

assertions.trap: cookies() in page makes route dynamic
assertions.description: Flag cookies()/headers() in layouts — explain dynamic blast radius

assertions.trap: useEffect to compute totalRevenue from orders
assertions.description: Derive state during render, never in effects

assertions.trap: useMemo for simple toUpperCase()
assertions.description: Don't useMemo simple primitive expressions

assertions.trap: useEffect depends on user object, not user.id
assertions.description: Primitive values as effect dependencies, not objects

assertions.trap: useState(window.innerWidth) crashes SSR
assertions.description: useState(() => fn) initializer for SSR-unsafe/expensive defaults

assertions.trap: Manual loading/setLoading boolean for async
assertions.description: useTransition for non-urgent state updates instead of manual loading booleans

assertions.trap: useState for high-frequency mouse position
assertions.description: useRef for transient high-frequency values (mouse position)

assertions.trap: categories.find() inside orders.map() — O(n*m)
assertions.description: Build Map/index for repeated collection lookups

assertions.trap: .filter((v,i,a) => a.indexOf(v) === i) deduplication
assertions.description: [...new Set(arr)] for deduplication

assertions.trap: Chained .filter().map().filter().reduce() on orders
assertions.description: Combine chained filter/map/reduce into single loop for large arrays

assertions.trap: Regex created inside component
assertions.description: Hoist RegExp creation outside component functions

assertions.trap: {order.isAdmin && <AdminPanel />}
assertions.description: Ternary operator for conditional rendering, not &&

assertions.trap: HeavyModal imported eagerly
assertions.description: next/dynamic or React.lazy for heavy/rarely-used components

assertions.trap: No preload on modal trigger hover
assertions.description: Preload lazy-loaded components on hover/focus

assertions.trap: All data passed from server to single client component
assertions.description: Minimize data passed from server to client; avoid duplicate serialization

assertions.trap: Comment says 'runs like componentDidMount'
assertions.description: useEffect with [] is NOT componentDidMount — runs after paint

assertions.trap: Long list of orders rendered without virtualization hint
assertions.description: content-visibility: auto for long off-screen lists

assertions.trap: import { formatDate, parseQuery, debounce } from '@/utils' and import { Chart } from '@/components' — barrel file imports
assertions.description: Import directly from modules, avoid barrel files

assertions.trap: setCount(count + 1) with count in useCallback deps — stale closure
assertions.description: Use functional setState (setCount(c => c + 1)) for stable callbacks

assertions.trap: useEffect fires fetch on searchQuery change instead of event handler
assertions.description: Put interaction logic in event handlers, not effects

assertions.trap: Default prop { status: 'active', sort: 'date' } object recreated every render
assertions.description: Hoist default non-primitive props outside render

assertions.trap: useStore(state => state) subscribes to full store, only uses role
assertions.description: Subscribe to derived booleans (useStore(s => s.role === 'admin')), not full objects

assertions.trap: renderChart() inlined — expensive Chart subtree re-renders on every parent render
assertions.description: Extract expensive subtrees into memoized components (React.memo)

assertions.trap: onMessage callback in effect dep causes re-subscribe on every user.name change
assertions.description: useLatest/ref pattern for stable callback references — store in ref to avoid effect re-runs

assertions.trap: localStorage.getItem/sessionStorage.getItem called on every render
assertions.description: Cache localStorage/sessionStorage reads — read once into state or ref

assertions.trap: Static footer JSX recreated every render inside component
assertions.description: Hoist static JSX outside component functions

assertions.trap: [...orders].sort() and [...orders].reverse() instead of toSorted()/toReversed()
assertions.description: Use toSorted()/toReversed() for immutable array transforms

assertions.trap: ProductsPage awaits all data before rendering — no Suspense boundaries
assertions.description: Use Suspense boundaries to stream progressively

assertions.trap: Script tag without strategy prop loads eagerly, blocks rendering
assertions.description: Defer third-party scripts with strategy="lazyOnload"

assertions.trap: FeedPage fetches /api/posts twice in separate useEffects
assertions.description: Use SWR for client request deduplication
